entry.title: ContrastAPI Security Tools
entry.description: 31 security research tools over remote MCP: CVE lookup with EPSS + CISA KEV enrichment, domain audit (SSL/DNS/SPF/DMARC), IP threat intel (Shodan + AbuseIPDB + ASN), dependency vulnerability scanner, IOC enrichment, and more. entry.seoTitle: ContrastAPI MCP Server for Claude Security Research
entry.seoDescription: Add ContrastAPI to Claude as a remote MCP server for CVE lookup, EPSS, KEV enrichment, domain audits, IP reputation, and dependency vulnerability scanning.
entry.author: UPinar
entry.cardDescription: 31 remote security tools: CVE+EPSS/KEV, domain audit, IP threat intel, dep scan. Free tier 100/hr, no key.
entry.installCommand: claude mcp add --transport http contrastapi https://api.contrastcyber.com/mcp/
entry.usageSnippet:
claude mcp add --transport http contrastapi https://api.contrastcyber.com/mcp/
claude mcp list
entry.copySnippet:
claude mcp add --transport http contrastapi https://api.contrastcyber.com/mcp/
claude mcp list
entry.body:
## Overview

31 security research tools over remote MCP: CVE lookup with EPSS + CISA KEV enrichment, domain audit (SSL/DNS/SPF/DMARC), IP threat intel (Shodan + AbuseIPDB + ASN), dependency vulnerability scanner, IOC enrichment, and more. Free tier: 100 credits/hour, no API key required. Streamable-HTTP transport.

## Usage

claude mcp add --transport http contrastapi https://api.contrastcyber.com/mcp/
claude mcp list

## Auth Requirements

None required for free tier (100 credits/hour per IP). Optional X-API-Key header for Pro tier (1000/hr). See https://api.contrastcyber.com/pricing

## Verification

1. `claude mcp list` shows contrastapi as connected
2. Ask Claude: "Look up CVE-2021-44228 with EPSS and KEV data"
3. Response includes verdict.completeness=full with real CVSS + EPSS percentile (~94%) + KEV listing date
